hero.headline: A Think Tank for the Future of Community Intelligence
hero.subheadline: AEGIS AI Cooperative builds human-centric infrastructure for STEM education and community advancement—forging a future where technology empowers people without complexity or fear.

grantServices.headline: Infrastructure for the Next Generation
grantServices.subheadline: We turn visionary concepts into reliable community infrastructure, focused on education, accessibility, and trust.

services.title: Community STEM Infrastructure
services.description: We architect secure, easy-to-use platforms that bring advanced technical literacy to students, parents, and community leaders. We handle the engineering complexity so you can focus on the impact.
features: Curated educational tools without the scare-tactics
Simplified tracking for student and community progress

services.title: Grant Performance Auditing
services.description: Our transparent architecture ensures that every grant dollar is accounted for. We provide clear, plain-english reports that prove community impact and mandate compliance.
features: Permanent, readable records of system utility

items.title: Designed for People, Not Agendas
items.description: We don't chase AGI or silicon-valley hype. We build practical tools that solve real-world community problems today.

items.title: Safe & Familiar Foundations
items.description: Our systems operate in secure, isolated environments. We prioritize safety and ease-of-use above all else, making technology feel like a helper, not a replacement.

items.title: Human-Led Progress
items.description: The cooperative model ensures our incentives match the community's. You always have the final say in how systems are deployed and scaled.

items.title: Plain-English Transparency
items.description: We remove the jargon. You'll always understand exactly how our systems work, what they're doing, and why they are being used.

cta.headline: Building a Brighter, Shared Future
cta.subheadline: Interested in bringing elite-level technical infrastructure to your organization or community?
